name: Kinari
description: Unbleached naturals. Raw cotton and undyed linen in the color they came in. Our foundation line — nothing added, nothing taken.

name: Sumi
description: Dark essentials in deep charcoal and warm sumi-black. Precise tailoring and heavier weights. The pieces you reach for without thinking.

name: Ai
description: Indigo-dyed cottons and denims that deepen with wear. Rope-dyed by hand, made to keep their own record over years.

name: Hinoki
description: Cypress-warm naturals — brushed knits, soft wovens, and earthy neutrals. Quiet warmth in the weight and the weave.

name: Kuro
description: The limited black line. Numbered, low inventory, made once. When it is gone, it is gone.

name: Shiro
description: Clean whites. The essential tee, the crisp oxford, the white that holds its shape. Restraint, in its plainest form.
